    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--transition-speed) var(--easing-curve);
}

.agent-reasoning-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.agent-reasoning-btn .icon-slot {
    font-size: 18px;
}

.agent-reasoning-content {
    padding: 0;
    background: var(--code-bg);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    white-space: pre-wrap;
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.3s var(--easing-curve), padding 0.3s var(--easing-curve);
    border-radius: 0 0 var(--border-radius-md) var(--border-radius-md);
}

.agent-reasoning-content.expanded {
    max-height: 300px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 1rem;
}


.no-data-message {
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-style: italic;
    padding: 2rem;
    background: var(--secondary-bg);
    border-radius: 12px;
    margin: 1rem 0;
}

.sub-strategy-purple-id {
    color: #8b5cf6;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 2px 6px;
    background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
}

.raw-response {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 16px;
    font-family: var(--font-family-mono);
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    white-space: pre-wrap;
    word-break: break-word;
    overflow-x: auto;
    max-height: 400px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    margin: 8px 0;
}

.raw-response::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
}

.raw-response::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: transparent;
}

.raw-response::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 3px;
}

.raw-response::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background: var(--text-tertiary);
}
</file>

<file path="DeepthinkLiveTab.css">
.deepthink-pipeline-react-root {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    height: 100%;
}

.deepthink-live-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0;
    color: var(--text-color, #e0e0e0);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.timeline-header-panel {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.25);
    gap: 0.5rem;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.panel-header-top {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
}

.panel-title-left {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    white-space: nowrap;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.compact-status {
    padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem !important;
    font-size: 0.6rem !important;
    gap: 0.25rem !important;
    border-radius: 4px !important;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    white-space: nowrap;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.timeline-stats-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.15);
    padding-top: 0.4rem;
}

.stat-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.35rem;
}

.stat-label {
    color: var(--text-tertiary-color, #707A95);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.stat-value {
    color: var(--text-color, #EAEBF5);
    font-weight: 700;
}

.duration-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.25rem;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.45rem;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 14px);
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.2);
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    white-space: nowrap;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.duration-pill-icon {
    font-size: 0.75rem !important;
}

.status-pill {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    width: fit-content;
}

.status-pill.status-processing {
    background: rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.15);
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.3);
}

.status-pill.status-completed {
    background: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.15);
    color: #00e676;
    border: 1px solid rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.3);
}

.status-pill.status-error {
    background: rgba(255, 23, 68, 0.15);
    color: #ff1744;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 23, 68, 0.3);
}

.status-pill.status-idle {
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.05);
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.pulse-indicator {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.status-processing .pulse-indicator {
    background: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.7);
    animation: pulse 1.5s infinite;
}

.status-completed .pulse-indicator {
    background: #00e676;
}

.status-error .pulse-indicator {
    background: #ff1744;
}

.status-idle .pulse-indicator {
    background: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0% {
        transform: scale(0.95);
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 210, 255, 0.7);
    }
    70% {
        transform: scale(1);
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(0, 210, 255, 0);
    }
    100% {
        transform: scale(0.95);
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0, 210, 255, 0);
    }
}

/* Agent Type Colors */
.category-strategy {
    --agent-color: var(--accent-purple, #7c4af0);
    --agent-color-rgb: var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240);
}
.category-hypothesis {
    --agent-color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    --agent-color-rgb: var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255);
}
.category-redteam {
    --agent-color: var(--accent-pink, #ff1744);
    --agent-color-rgb: var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68);
}
.category-critique {
    --agent-color: var(--accent-yellow, #f59e0b);
    --agent-color-rgb: var(--accent-yellow-rgb, 245, 158, 11);
}
.category-solutionpool {
    --agent-color: var(--accent-orange, #f59e0b);
    --agent-color-rgb: 245, 158, 11;
}
.category-dissected {
    --agent-color: var(--accent-green, #00e676);
    --agent-color-rgb: var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118);
}
.category-general {
    --agent-color: var(--text-color, #e0e0e0);
    --agent-color-rgb: var(--text-color-rgb, 224, 224, 224);
}

/* Workspace Layout */
.live-workspace {
    display: flex;
    flex: 1;
    gap: 1rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
}

/* Panels Common */
.panel-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.panel-title-icon {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
}

/* Left Sidebar (Timeline) */
.live-sidebar {
    width: 320px;
    flex: 0 0 320px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.35);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect, blur(10px));
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-lg, 32px);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

.agent-timeline {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 1rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1.25rem;
}

.timeline-empty {
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem 0;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.timeline-node {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 14px);
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.timeline-node:hover {
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.03);
}

.timeline-node.active {
    background: rgba(var(--agent-color-rgb), 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(var(--agent-color-rgb), 0.25);
}

.node-connector-line {
    position: absolute;
    left: 17px;
    top: 30px;
    bottom: -30px;
    width: 2px;
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.08);
    z-index: 1;
}

.timeline-node:last-child .node-connector-line {
    display: none;
}

.node-icon-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.85);
    border: 1px solid rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.2);
    z-index: 2;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.node-status-icon {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.timeline-node.completed .node-icon-wrapper {
    border-color: #00e676;
    background: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.1);
    color: #00e676;
}

.timeline-node.running .node-icon-wrapper {
    border-color: var(--agent-color);
    color: var(--agent-color);
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--agent-color-rgb), 0.25);
}

.timeline-node.running .node-status-icon {
    animation: spin 4s linear infinite;
}

.node-content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.15rem;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.node-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.node-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: var(--agent-color);
}

.node-time {
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
}

.node-description {
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
}

/* Right Main Content */
.live-main-content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Inspector Panel */
.live-inspector-panel {
    flex: 1;
    min-height: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.35);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect, blur(10px));
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-lg, 32px);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

.panel-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding-right: 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.panel-title-left {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
}

.selected-agent-config {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}

.config-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.3rem;
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.05);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 14px);
    color: var(--text-color, #e0e0e0);
}

.config-badge.model {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.08);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.25);
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
}

.config-badge.exec {
    background: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.08);
    border-color: rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.2);
    color: #00e676;
}

.inspector-content {
    flex: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.inspector-two-columns {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Column Rules - Avoid overflow and split space 50/50 */
.inspector-column {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
}

.left-column {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.left-column .inspector-card {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    min-height: 0;
}

/* Collapsible Instruction Layout */
.left-column .system-instruction-card {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.left-column .system-instruction-card.expanded {
    flex: 1;
}

.left-column .user-prompt-card {
    flex: 1;
}

.left-column .prompt-editor-wrapper {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    min-height: 0;
}

.right-column {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

.right-column .inspector-card {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    min-height: 0;
}

/* Card inside inspector columns */
.inspector-card {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-md, 24px);
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

.inspector-card-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.03);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.card-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.code-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.25rem;
}

.copy-btn-action, .download-btn-action {
    scale: 0.85;
    margin: -4px;
}

/* Response math container and prompt wrapper heights */
.inspector-card-body {
    padding: 0.75rem;
}

.response-math-wrapper {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    min-height: 0;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.response-math-wrapper p {
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.response-math-wrapper pre {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    margin: 0.5rem 0;
}

.error-wrapper {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    min-height: 0;
    color: #ff1744;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
    white-space: pre-wrap;
    word-break: break-all;
}

.waiting-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    height: 100%;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.waiting-spinner {
    animation: spin 2s linear infinite;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
}

/* Let the PromptStylingEditor inherit standard system fonts */
.prompt-styling-editor.read-only {
    background: transparent !important;
    border: none !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    pointer-events: auto !important;
}

.inspector-empty {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    text-align: center;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.empty-icon {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

/* Bottom Console Panel */
.live-terminal-panel {
    height: 230px;
    flex: 0 0 230px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.25);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect, blur(10px));
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-lg, 32px);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

.terminal-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.35);
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.terminal-actions-left {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
}

.terminal-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    opacity: 0.8;
}

.terminal-dot.red { background: #ff5f56; }
.terminal-dot.yellow { background: #ffbd2e; }
.terminal-dot.green { background: #27c93f; }

.terminal-title {
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    margin-left: 0.5rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}

.terminal-actions-right {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
}

/* Global Tab style separation for Console Filter Tabs */
.console-filter-tabs {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 0;
}

.console-tab-button {
    position: relative;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 14px);
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    text-transform: none;
    background: transparent;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1);
}

/* ALL -> Blue */
.console-tab-button.tab-all {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.08);
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.1);
}
.console-tab-button.tab-all.active {
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.5);
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.2),
                0 0 2px rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.3) inset;
}
.console-tab-button.tab-all:hover:not(.active) {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.18);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.35);
}

/* AGENTS -> Purple */
.console-tab-button.tab-agents {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.08);
    color: var(--accent-purple, #7c4af0);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.1);
}
.console-tab-button.tab-agents.active {
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.5);
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.2),
                0 0 2px rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.3) inset;
}
.console-tab-button.tab-agents:hover:not(.active) {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.18);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb, 124, 74, 240), 0.35);
}

/* INFO -> Green */
.console-tab-button.tab-info {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.08);
    color: var(--accent-green, #00e676);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.1);
}
.console-tab-button.tab-info.active {
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.5);
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.2),
                0 0 2px rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.3) inset;
}
.console-tab-button.tab-info:hover:not(.active) {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.18);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-green-rgb, 0, 230, 118), 0.35);
}

/* ERRORS -> Red */
.console-tab-button.tab-errors {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.08);
    color: var(--accent-pink, #ff1744);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.1);
}
.console-tab-button.tab-errors.active {
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.5);
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.2),
                0 0 2px rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.3) inset;
}
.console-tab-button.tab-errors:hover:not(.active) {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.18);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb, 255, 23, 68), 0.35);
}

.search-box {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.search-icon {
    position: absolute;
    left: 8px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
}

.search-input {
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.04);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-sm, 14px);
    color: var(--text-color, #e0e0e0);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem 0.2rem 1.8rem;
    width: 130px;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.search-input:focus {
    width: 170px;
    border-color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    outline: none;
}

.terminal-body {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.3rem;
}

.terminal-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.4rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    transition: background 0.15s ease;
}

.terminal-row:hover {
    background: rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.03);
}

.terminal-row.highlighted {
    background: rgba(var(--agent-color-rgb), 0.08);
}

.log-time {
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    opacity: 0.65;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.log-badge {
    font-weight: 700;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.log-agent {
    color: var(--agent-color);
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-weight: 600;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.log-message {
    color: var(--text-color);
    word-break: break-all;
}

.log-start .log-badge { color: var(--agent-color); }
.log-complete .log-badge { color: #00e676; }
.log-error .log-badge { color: #ff1744; }
.log-retry .log-badge { color: #ffbd2e; }

.terminal-row.empty {
    color: var(--text-secondary-color, #888);
    padding: 1rem;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Light Theme overrides */
body.light-mode .log-time {
    color: #555555;
    opacity: 0.8;
}

body.light-mode .waiting-spinner {
    color: var(--accent-blue, #0099cc);
}



/* Parallel Active Execution Window styling */
.parallel-active-window {
    border: 1px dashed rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.35);
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.02);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-md, 24px);
    padding: 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.75rem 0.5rem;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    position: relative;
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.04) inset;
}

.parallel-window-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    font-size: 0.7rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-blue, #00d2ff);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    padding-bottom: 0.25rem;
    border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb, 0, 210, 255), 0.15);
}

.parallel-icon {
    font-size: 0.85rem !important;
    animation: pulse-glow 1.5s infinite ease-in-out;
}

@keyframes pulse-glow {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 0.6; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 1px var(--accent-blue)); }
    50% { opacity: 1; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px var(--accent-blue)); }
}

.parallel-window-body {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.75rem;
}
</file>

<file path="DeepthinkLiveTab.tsx">
import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef } from 'react';
import { DeepthinkPipelineState, DeepthinkLiveEvent } from './DeepthinkCore';
import { Icon as MIcon } from '../UI/Icons';
import { ActionButton } from '../Styles/Components/ActionButton';
import RenderMathMarkdown from '../Styles/Components/RenderMathMarkdown';
import { PromptStylingEditor } from '../Styles/Components/PromptStyling';
import './DeepthinkLiveTab.css';

interface DeepthinkLiveTabProps {
    process: DeepthinkPipelineState;
}

export const DeepthinkLiveTab: React.FC<DeepthinkLiveTabProps> = ({ process }) => {
    const [selectedEventId, setSelectedEventId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<'all' | 'agents' | 'info' | 'errors'>('all');
    const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
    const [timeElapsed, setTimeElapsed] = useState('00:00');
    const [isSystemInstructionExpanded, setIsSystemInstructionExpanded] = useState(false);

    const terminalEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    const timerRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
    const startTimeRef = useRef<number>(Date.now());

    // Timer logic for execution duration
    useEffect(() => {
        if (process.status === 'processing') {
            const firstEvent = process.liveEvents?.[0];
            const baseTime = firstEvent ? firstEvent.timestamp : Date.now();
            startTimeRef.current = baseTime;

            const updateTimer = () => {
                const diff = Date.now() - startTimeRef.current;
                const secs = Math.floor((diff / 1000) % 60);
                const mins = Math.floor((diff / 1000 / 60) % 60);
                setTimeElapsed(`${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`);
            };

            updateTimer();
            timerRef.current = setInterval(updateTimer, 1000);
        } else {
            if (timerRef.current) {
                clearInterval(timerRef.current);
                timerRef.current = null;
            }

            const events = process.liveEvents || [];
            if (events.length > 1) {
                const diff = events[events.length - 1].timestamp - events[0].timestamp;
                const totalSecs = Math.floor(diff / 1000);
                const secs = totalSecs % 60;
                const mins = Math.floor(totalSecs / 60) % 60;
                setTimeElapsed(`${mins.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`);
            } else {
                setTimeElapsed('00:00');
            }
        }

        return () => {
            if (timerRef.current) clearInterval(timerRef.current);
        };
    }, [process.status, process.liveEvents?.length]);

    // Auto scroll logic (always auto-scroll to bottom of terminal console on new event)
    useEffect(() => {
        if (terminalEndRef.current) {
            terminalEndRef.current.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
    }, [process.liveEvents?.length]);

    const events = process.liveEvents || [];

    // Helper to determine agent category for color mapping
    const getAgentCategory = (agentName: string, stepDescription: string): string => {
        const name = (agentName || '').toLowerCase();
        const desc = (stepDescription || '').toLowerCase();

        // Critique / Criticism
        if (name.includes('critique') || desc.includes('critique') || name.includes('critic') || desc.includes('critic')) {
            return 'critique'; // Yellow
        }
        // Evolution filter / adversarial review
        if (name.includes('evolution filter') || desc.includes('evolution filter') || name.includes('postqualityfilter') || desc.includes('postqualityfilter') || name.includes('attack') || desc.includes('attack')) {
            return 'redteam'; // Red
        }
        // Correction / Refinement / Dissect / Quality filter / PostQF
        if (
            name.includes('correction') || desc.includes('correction') || 
            name.includes('refinement') || desc.includes('refinement') ||
            name.includes('dissect') || desc.includes('dissect') || 
            name.includes('quality filter') || desc.includes('quality filter') || 
            name.includes('postqf')
        ) {
            return 'dissected'; // Green
        }
        // Strategy / Sub-Strategy / Execution / Attempt / Solver
        if (
            name.includes('strategy') || desc.includes('strategy') || 
            name.includes('attempt') || desc.includes('attempt') || 
            name.includes('execution') || desc.includes('execution') ||
            name.includes('solver') || desc.includes('solver')
        ) {
            return 'strategy'; // Purple
        }
        // Hypothesis
        if (name.includes('hypothesis') || desc.includes('hypothesis')) {
            return 'hypothesis'; // Blue
        }
        // Solution Pool
        if (name.includes('pool') || desc.includes('pool')) {
            return 'solutionpool'; // Orange
        }
        return 'general';
    };

    // Find currently running agents to determine parallel execution
    const activeAgents: string[] = [];
    events.forEach(ev => {
        if (ev.eventType === 'agent_start') {
            if (!activeAgents.includes(ev.agentName)) {
                activeAgents.push(ev.agentName);
            }
        } else if (ev.eventType === 'agent_complete' || ev.eventType === 'agent_error') {
            const idx = activeAgents.indexOf(ev.agentName);
            if (idx !== -1) {
                activeAgents.splice(idx, 1);
            }
        }
    });


    // Filtered events for the terminal log console
    const filteredEvents = events.filter(ev => {
        if (filterType === 'agents' && !['agent_start', 'agent_complete', 'agent_error', 'agent_retry'].includes(ev.eventType)) return false;
        if (filterType === 'info' && ev.eventType !== 'info') return false;
        if (filterType === 'errors' && ev.eventType !== 'agent_error') return false;

        if (searchQuery) {
            const query = searchQuery.toLowerCase();
            return (
                ev.agentName.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
                ev.stepDescription.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
                (ev.prompt && ev.prompt.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
                (ev.response && ev.response.toLowerCase().includes(query)) ||
                (ev.error && ev.error.toLowerCase().includes(query))
            );
        }
        return true;
    });

    // Unique agents list for the timeline: only show Start and Done. Do not show info, error, retry.
    const agentEventsMap = new Map<string, DeepthinkLiveEvent>();
    events.forEach(ev => {
        if (ev.agentName) {
            if (ev.eventType === 'agent_start' || ev.eventType === 'agent_complete') {
                agentEventsMap.set(ev.agentName, ev);
            } else if (ev.eventType === 'agent_error') {
                // If the agent failed/errored, remove it from the timeline
                agentEventsMap.delete(ev.agentName);
            }
        }
    });
    const allTimelineAgents = Array.from(agentEventsMap.values());
    const completedAgents = allTimelineAgents.filter(a => a.eventType === 'agent_complete').sort((a, b) => a.timestamp - b.timestamp);
    const runningAgents = allTimelineAgents.filter(a => a.eventType === 'agent_start').sort((a, b) => a.timestamp - b.timestamp);

    // Selected event details: Auto-track state transition of selected agent (e.g. from start to complete)
    let selectedEvent = events.find(e => e.id === selectedEventId);
    if (selectedEvent && selectedEvent.agentName && ['agent_start', 'agent_retry'].includes(selectedEvent.eventType)) {
        const latestAgentEvent = agentEventsMap.get(selectedEvent.agentName);
        if (latestAgentEvent) {
            selectedEvent = latestAgentEvent;
        }
    }

    if (!selectedEvent && allTimelineAgents.length > 0) {
        const latestAgent = allTimelineAgents[allTimelineAgents.length - 1];
        if (latestAgent && latestAgent.agentName) {
            const latestAgentEvent = agentEventsMap.get(latestAgent.agentName);
            if (latestAgentEvent) {
                selectedEvent = latestAgentEvent;
            }
        }
    }

    if (!selectedEvent) {
        selectedEvent = events[events.length - 1];
    }

    const renderTimelineNode = (agent: DeepthinkLiveEvent) => {
        const isActive = selectedEvent?.agentName === agent.agentName;
        const category = getAgentCategory(agent.agentName, agent.stepDescription);
        let statusClass = 'pending';
        let statusIcon = 'hourglass_empty';

        if (agent.eventType === 'agent_complete') {
            statusClass = 'completed';
            statusIcon = 'check';
        } else if (agent.eventType === 'agent_start' || agent.eventType === 'agent_retry') {
            statusClass = 'running';
            statusIcon = 'sync';
        }

        return (
            <div 
                key={agent.id} 
                className={`timeline-node ${statusClass} ${isActive ? 'active' : ''} category-${statusClass === 'completed' ? category : 'general'}`}
                onClick={() => setSelectedEventId(agent.id)}
            >
                <div className="node-connector-line"></div>
                <div className="node-icon-wrapper">
                    <MIcon name={statusIcon} className="node-status-icon" />
                </div>
                <div className="node-content">
                    <div className="node-header">
                        <span className="node-name font-mono">{agent.agentName}</span>
                        <span className="node-time font-mono">
                            {new Date(agent.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' })}
                        </span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="node-description truncate">
                        {agent.stepDescription}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        );
    };

    return (
        <div className="deepthink-live-container">
            {/* Split Screen Workspace */}
            <div className="live-workspace">
                {/* Left Side: Agent Timeline */}
                <div className="live-sidebar">
                    <div className="timeline-header-panel">
                        <div className="panel-header-top">
                            <div className="panel-title-left">
                                <MIcon name="lan" className="panel-title-icon" />
                                <span>Execution Timeline</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="timeline-stats-row">
                            <div className={`status-pill status-${process.status} compact-status`}>
                                <span className="pulse-indicator"></span>
                                <span className="status-text">{process.status.toUpperCase()}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="duration-pill font-mono">
                                <MIcon name="timer" className="duration-pill-icon" />
                                <span>{timeElapsed}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="stat-item">
                                <span className="stat-label">INVOKED:</span>
                                <span className="stat-value font-mono">{allTimelineAgents.length}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="agent-timeline custom-scrollbar">
                        {allTimelineAgents.length === 0 ? (
                            <div className="timeline-empty">Waiting for agent execution...</div>
                        ) : (
                            <>
                                {completedAgents.map(renderTimelineNode)}
                                {runningAgents.length > 1 ? (
                                    <div className="parallel-active-window">
                                        <div className="parallel-window-header">
                                            <MIcon name="bolt" className="parallel-icon" />
                                            <span>Executing in Parallel</span>
                                        </div>
                                        <div className="parallel-window-body">
                                            {runningAgents.map(renderTimelineNode)}
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                ) : (
                                    runningAgents.map(renderTimelineNode)
                                )}
                            </>
                        )}
                    </div>
                </div>

                {/* Right Side: Terminal Log & Prompt Inspector */}
                <div className="live-main-content">
                    {/* Top Right: Inspector */}
                    <div className="live-inspector-panel">
                        <div className="panel-header">
                            <div className="panel-title-left">
                                <MIcon name="search" className="panel-title-icon" />
                                <span>Agent Inspector</span>
                            </div>
                            
                            {selectedEvent && (selectedEvent.modelName || selectedEvent.temperature !== undefined) && (
                                <div className="selected-agent-config font-mono">
                                    {selectedEvent.modelName && (
                                        <span className="config-badge model" title="Model Name">
                                            <MIcon name="smart_toy" /> {selectedEvent.modelName}
                                        </span>
                                    )}
                                    {selectedEvent.temperature !== undefined && (
                                        <span className="config-badge temp" title="Temperature">
                                            Temp: {selectedEvent.temperature}
                                        </span>
                                    )}
                                    {selectedEvent.topP !== undefined && (
                                        <span className="config-badge topp" title="Top-P">
                                            Top-P: {selectedEvent.topP}
                                        </span>
                                    )}
                                    {selectedEvent.codeExecutionEnabled && (
                                        <span className="config-badge exec" title="Python Tool Enabled">
                                            PythonTool
                                        </span>
                                    )}
                                </div>
                            )}
                        </div>

                        <div className="inspector-content">
                            {!selectedEvent ? (
                                <div className="inspector-empty">
                                    <MIcon name="info" className="empty-icon" />
                                    <p>Select an agent in the timeline or logs to inspect its inputs and outputs.</p>
                                </div>
                            ) : (
                                <div className="inspector-two-columns">
                                    {/* Left Column: System & User Prompts */}
                                    <div className="inspector-column left-column">
                                        {/* System Instruction */}
                                        {selectedEvent.systemInstruction && (
                                            <div className={`inspector-card system-instruction-card ${isSystemInstructionExpanded ? 'expanded' : 'collapsed'}`}>
                                                <div 
                                                    className="inspector-card-header collapsible-header"
                                                    onClick={() => setIsSystemInstructionExpanded(!isSystemInstructionExpanded)}
                                                    style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}
                                                >
                                                    <span className="card-title">
                                                        <MIcon name={isSystemInstructionExpanded ? "expand_less" : "expand_more"} />
                                                        System Instruction
                                                    </span>
                                                    <div className="code-actions" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                                                        <ActionButton
                                                            type="copy"
                                                            content={selectedEvent.systemInstruction}
                                                            icon="content_copy"
                                                            text="Copy"
                                                            className="copy-btn-action"
                                                        />
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                {isSystemInstructionExpanded && (
                                                    <div className="inspector-card-body prompt-editor-wrapper custom-scrollbar">
                                                        <PromptStylingEditor 
                                                            value={selectedEvent.systemInstruction} 
                                                            readOnly={true} 
                                                            className="inspector-prompt-display"
                                                        />
                                                    </div>
                                                )}
                                            </div>
                                        )}

                                        {/* User Prompt */}
                                        {selectedEvent.prompt && (
                                            <div className="inspector-card user-prompt-card">
                                                <div className="inspector-card-header">
                                                    <span className="card-title">
                                                        <MIcon name="description" /> User Prompt (Injected Context)
                                                    </span>
                                                    <div className="code-actions">
                                                        <ActionButton
                                                            type="copy"
                                                            content={selectedEvent.prompt}
                                                            icon="content_copy"
                                                            text="Copy"
                                                            className="copy-btn-action"
                                                        />
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="inspector-card-body prompt-editor-wrapper custom-scrollbar">
                                                    <PromptStylingEditor 
                                                        value={selectedEvent.prompt} 
                                                        readOnly={true} 
                                                        className="inspector-prompt-display"
                                                    />
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        )}
                                    </div>

                                    {/* Right Column: Model Response / Errors */}
                                    <div className="inspector-column right-column">
                                        {selectedEvent.response && (
                                            <div className="inspector-card">
                                                <div className="inspector-card-header">
                                                    <span className="card-title">
                                                        <MIcon name="smart_toy" /> Model Response
                                                    </span>
                                                    <div className="code-actions">
                                                        <ActionButton
                                                            type="copy"
                                                            content={selectedEvent.response}
                                                            icon="content_copy"
                                                            text="Copy"
                                                            className="copy-btn-action"
                                                        />
                                                        <ActionButton
                                                            type="download"
                                                            content={selectedEvent.response}
                                                            filename="model-response.md"
                                                            icon="download"
                                                            text="Download"
                                                            className="download-btn-action"
                                                        />
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="inspector-card-body response-math-wrapper custom-scrollbar">
                                                    <RenderMathMarkdown content={selectedEvent.response} />
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        )}

                                        {selectedEvent.error && (
                                            <div className="inspector-card">
                                                <div className="inspector-card-header">
                                                    <span className="card-title">
                                                        <MIcon name="report_problem" /> Error Log
                                                    </span>
                                                </div>
                                                <div className="inspector-card-body error-wrapper custom-scrollbar font-mono">
                                                    {selectedEvent.error}
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        )}

                                        {!selectedEvent.response && !selectedEvent.error && (
                                            <div className="inspector-card pending">
                                                <div className="inspector-card-body waiting-wrapper">
                                                    <MIcon name="sync" className="waiting-spinner" />
                                                    <span>Agent is processing, waiting for response...</span>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        )}
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            )}
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Bottom Right: Terminal Log Console */}
                    <div className="live-terminal-panel">
                        <div className="terminal-header">
                            <div className="terminal-actions-left">
                                <div className="terminal-dot red"></div>
                                <div className="terminal-dot yellow"></div>
                                <div className="terminal-dot green"></div>
                                <span className="terminal-title font-mono">deepthink-agentic-console.log</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="terminal-actions-right">
                                <div className="console-filter-tabs">
                                    {(['all', 'agents', 'info', 'errors'] as const).map(type => (
                                        <button 
                                            key={type}
                                            className={`tab-button console-tab-button tab-${type} ${filterType === type ? 'active' : ''}`}
                                            onClick={() => setFilterType(type)}
                                        >
                                            {type.toUpperCase()}
                                        </button>
                                    ))}
                                </div>
                                <div className="search-box">
                                    <MIcon name="search" className="search-icon" />
                                    <input 
                                        type="text" 
                                        placeholder="Search logs..." 
                                        value={searchQuery}
                                        onChange={e => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                                        className="search-input"
                                    />
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="terminal-body font-mono custom-scrollbar">
                            {filteredEvents.length === 0 ? (
                                <div className="terminal-row empty">Console is silent. Awaiting execution stream...</div>
                            ) : (
                                filteredEvents.map((ev) => {
                                    const category = getAgentCategory(ev.agentName, ev.stepDescription);
                                    let lineClass = 'log-info';
                                    let badge = '[INFO]';

                                    if (ev.eventType === 'agent_start') {
                                        lineClass = 'log-start';
                                        badge = '[START]';
                                    } else if (ev.eventType === 'agent_complete') {
                                        lineClass = 'log-complete';
                                        badge = '[DONE]';
                                    } else if (ev.eventType === 'agent_error') {
                                        lineClass = 'log-error';
                                        badge = '[FAIL]';
                                    } else if (ev.eventType === 'agent_retry') {
                                        lineClass = 'log-retry';
                                        badge = '[RETRY]';
                                    }

                                    return (
                                        <div 
                                            key={ev.id} 
                                            className={`terminal-row ${lineClass} ${selectedEvent?.id === ev.id ? 'highlighted' : ''} category-${category}`}
                                            onClick={() => setSelectedEventId(ev.id)}
                                        >
                                            <span className="log-time">
                                                {new Date(ev.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour12: false })}
                                            </span>
                                            <span className="log-badge">{badge}</span>
                                            <span className="log-agent">[{ev.agentName}]</span>
                                            <span className="log-message">{ev.stepDescription}</span>
                                        </div>
                                    );
                                })
                            )}
                            <div ref={terminalEndRef} />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};
</file>

<file path="DeepthinkModals.css">
/* ==========================================================================
   DEEPTHINK MODAL STYLES - MASTER SHEET
   ========================================================================== */

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1. SHARED ANIMATIONS
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */


@keyframes slideUp {
    from {
        transform: translateY(20px);
        opacity: 0;
    }

    to {
        transform: translateY(0);
        opacity: 1;
    }
}


@keyframes modalSlideIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translate(-50%, -45%) scale(0.95);
    }

    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1);
    }
}

@keyframes solution-nav-shimmer {
    0% {
        transform: translateX(-100%);
    }

    100% {
        transform: translateX(100%);
    }
}

@keyframes solution-card-glow {

    0%,
    100% {
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    }

    50% {
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl), 0 0 20px -5px rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb), 0.2);
    }
}

@keyframes diff-highlight {
    0% {
        background-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.1);
    }

    50% {
        background-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.2);
    }

    100% {
        background-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.1);
    }
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   3. STANDARD MODAL OVERLAY & CONTENT
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

/* Overlay Base */
.modal-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: 2100;
    display: none;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

    background-color: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.62);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity var(--transition-speed-slow) var(--easing-curve);
}

.modal-overlay.is-visible {
    display: flex;
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Content Base */
.modal-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    width: 100vw;
    max-width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    padding: 0;

    background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.7), rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.6));
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);

    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    transform: scale(0.98) translateY(10px);
    transition: transform var(--transition-speed-slow) cubic-bezier(0.16, 1.2, 0.3, 1),
        opacity var(--transition-speed-slow) var(--easing-curve);
    opacity: 0;
}

.modal-overlay.is-visible .modal-content {
    transform: scale(1) translateY(0);
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Standard Header */
.modal-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.5);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.modal-title {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.modal-body {
    flex-grow: 1;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* Close Button Base */
.modal-close-button {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-md);
    transition: all var(--transition-speed-fast);
}

.modal-close-button:hover {
    background: rgba(var(--text-color-rgb), 0.1);
    color: var(--text-color);
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   4. FULLSCREEN MODAL VARIANT
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.fullscreen-modal {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: 10000;
    display: flex;

    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.75);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
}

.fullscreen-modal.is-visible {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Fix for index.css overrides */
.modal-overlay.fullscreen-modal {
    align-items: flex-start !important;
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
}

.fullscreen-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1 !important;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;

    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.3);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    box-shadow: inset 0 2px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05),
        inset 0 -2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

/* Fullscreen Header (Glassmorphism) */
.fullscreen-modal .modal-header {
    flex-shrink: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    padding: 1rem 2rem !important;

    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.85) !important;
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.15) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03);
    z-index: 10;
    box-sizing: border-box !important;
}

.fullscreen-modal .modal-title {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--text-color) 0%, var(--text-secondary-color) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}

.fullscreen-modal .modal-body {
    padding: 0 !important;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
}

/* Fullscreen Close Button */
.fullscreen-modal .close-modal-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    padding: 0.5rem;

    background: rgba(var(--text-color-rgb), 0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.1);
    border-radius: 12px;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);

    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
}

.fullscreen-modal .close-modal-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb), 0.1);
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb), 0.3);
    color: var(--accent-pink);
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   5. EMBEDDED MODAL VARIANT
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.embedded-modal-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: 1000;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 2rem;

    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
}

.embedded-modal-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    width: 90%;
    min-width: 600px;
    max-width: 1400px;
    max-height: 80%;
    overflow: hidden;

    background: var(--bg-color);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 28px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);

    animation: slideUp 0.3s ease;
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-header {
    background: rgba(var(--card-bg-base-rgb), 0.5);
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
    display: flex !important;
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-header h4 {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-color);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: inline-block;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

/* Embedded Header Controls */
.embedded-modal-content .embedded-modal-header-left,
.embedded-modal-content .modal-header-left {
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    gap: 0.75rem !important;
    flex: 0 0 auto !important;
    min-width: 0;
    white-space: nowrap !important;
    flex-direction: row !important;
}

.embedded-modal-content .embedded-modal-header-controls {
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    flex: 0 0 auto !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
}

/* Iteration Indicator */
.embedded-modal-content .iteration-indicator {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 1.75rem;
    height: 1.75rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;

    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.15);
    border: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.3);
    border-radius: 50%;

    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent-blue);
}

/* Nav Buttons */
.embedded-modal-content .modal-nav-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 2rem;
    height: 2rem;
    padding: 0.25rem;

    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 16px;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);

    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-nav-btn:not(:disabled):hover {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.1);
    border-color: var(--accent-blue);
    color: var(--accent-blue);
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.3;
    cursor: not-allowed;
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-nav-btn .icon-slot {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
}

/* Embedded Close Button */
.embedded-modal-content .modal-header .close-modal-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.25rem;

    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);

    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    pointer-events: auto !important;
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-header .close-modal-btn:hover,
.embedded-modal-content .modal-header .close-modal-btn.simulated-hover {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-red-rgb), 0.1);
    color: var(--accent-red);
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-body {
    flex: 1;
    position: relative;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    max-height: calc(80vh - 100px);
    min-height: 0;
    overflow-y: auto !important;
    overflow-x: auto !important;
}

.embedded-modal-content .modal-content-wrapper {
    min-width: fit-content;
    width: 100%;
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   6. MODAL PANELS (Solution, Argument, Critique)
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.solution-modal-panel,
.argument-modal-panel,
.critique-modal-panel {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    max-width: none;
    z-index: 2000;

    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
    transform: none;

    background: var(--card-bg-color);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    box-shadow: none;

    animation: modalFadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
}

.modal-panel-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1.5rem 2rem;

    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.5);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
}

.modal-panel-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.modal-panel-subtitle {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
}

.modal-header-left {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.25rem;
}

.modal-subtitle {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--text-tertiary-color);
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

/* Panel Type Specifics */
.solution-modal-panel .modal-panel-title .icon-slot {
    color: var(--accent-green);
}

.argument-modal-panel .modal-panel-title .icon-slot {
    color: var(--accent-purple);
}

.critique-modal-panel .modal-panel-title .icon-slot {
    color: var(--accent-yellow);
}

.modal-panel-content {
    flex: 1;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 0;
    background: var(--bg-color);
}

.modal-panel-content .markdown-content {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.modal-panel-actions {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    gap: 1rem;
    padding: 1rem 2rem;

    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.modal-action-btn {
    padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    font-weight: 500;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.modal-close-btn {
    background: var(--bg-color);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.modal-close-btn:hover {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-color: var(--text-secondary-color);
}

/* Loading/Error States */
.modal-panel-loading,
.modal-panel-error {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
    text-align: center;
}

.modal-panel-loading {
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
    gap: 1rem;
}

.modal-panel-error {
    color: var(--accent-pink);
    padding: 2rem;
}

.no-content,
.error-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
    padding: 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
}

.error-content {
    color: var(--accent-pink);
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   7. SOLUTION LAYOUTS & COMPONENTS
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.solution-modal-layout {
    display: flex;
    height: 100%;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--bg-color);
    padding: 1rem 1rem 0 1rem;
    gap: 1.5rem;
}

/* Navigation Sidebar */
.solution-nav {
    width: 320px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding-right: 0.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;
}

.solution-nav-item:hover::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb), 0.1), transparent);
    animation: solution-nav-shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out;
    pointer-events: none;
}

.solution-nav-item.active::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -1px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 3px;
    height: 60%;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent-purple), rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb), 0.5));
    border-radius: 2px 0 0 2px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb), 0.4);
}

/* Solution Content Area */
.solution-content {
    flex-grow: 1;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;

    background: var(--card-bg-color);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-lg) var(--border-radius-lg) 0 0;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);

    /* Modal override max-width handling */
    max-width: none;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Historical layout class support */
.solution-side {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 2rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    background: var(--bg-color);
}

.solution-side.single-content {
    border-right: none;
    max-width: 1000px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 100%;
}

.hypothesis-section,
.analysis-section {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.hypothesis-content,
.analysis-content {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 2rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

.hypothesis-full-content {
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem;
    width: 100%;
}

/* Solution Panes */
.solution-content-pane {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    padding: 2rem 3rem 0 3rem;
    overflow-y: hidden;
    animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-out;
}

.solution-content-pane:not(.active) {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(10px);
}

.solution-content-pane.active {
    display: flex;
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
    transition: opacity var(--transition-speed) var(--easing-curve),
        transform var(--transition-speed) var(--easing-curve);
}

.solution-pane-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;

    font-size: 1.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-color);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.solution-pane-title .icon-slot {
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: var(--accent-purple);
}

/* Solution Card */
.solution-card {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    margin-bottom: 0;

    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.4);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-lg);
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: all var(--transition-speed) var(--easing-curve);
}

.solution-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--border-hover-color);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
}

.solution-card:focus-within {
    animation: solution-card-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    border-color: var(--accent-purple);
}

.solution-card-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem;

    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.6);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
}

.solution-card-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.solution-card-body {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

/* Comparison Grid */
.solution-comparison-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
    flex: 1;
    height: auto;
    min-height: 0;
}

.comparison-panel {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.3);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-md);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    overflow: hidden;
}

.comparison-panel:hover .comparison-panel-title {
    color: var(--accent-purple);
    text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb), 0.3);
}

.comparison-panel-title {
    padding: 1rem;
    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.6);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
    text-align: center;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.comparison-content {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    overflow-y: auto;
    flex-grow: 1;
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   8. TYPOGRAPHY & MARKDOWN (Consolidated)
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

/* Shared typography for all modal content areas */
.solution-markdown-content,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content,
.embedded-modal-content .solution-content,
.embedded-modal-content .hypothesis-content,
.embedded-modal-content .critique-content,
.embedded-modal-content .hypothesis-argument-content,
.agent-analysis {
    font-size: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

/* Paragraphs */
.solution-markdown-content p,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content p {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
}

/* Headings */
.solution-markdown-content h1,
.solution-markdown-content h2,
.solution-markdown-content h3,
.solution-markdown-content h4,
.solution-markdown-content h5,
.solution-markdown-content h6,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content h1,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content h2,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content h3,
.embedded-modal-content h5 {
    color: var(--text-color);
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.solution-markdown-content h1,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content h1 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    color: var(--accent-purple);
}

.solution-markdown-content h2,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content h2 {
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    color: var(--accent-blue);
}

.solution-markdown-content h3,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content h3 {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
}

.embedded-modal-content h5 {
    color: var(--accent-blue);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

/* Lists */
.solution-markdown-content ul,
.solution-markdown-content ol,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content ul,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content ol {
    margin: 1rem 0;
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
}

.solution-markdown-content li,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content li {
    margin-bottom: 0.5em;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
}

/* Code */
.solution-markdown-content :not(pre) > code,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content :not(pre) > code {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.1);
    color: var(--accent-blue);
    padding: 0.2rem 0.4rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    font-family: var(--font-family, monospace);
    font-size: 0.9em;
    border: 1px solid rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.2);
}

.solution-markdown-content pre:not(.code-block-container pre),
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content pre:not(.code-block-container pre) {
    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.6);
    /* Fallback/Specific */
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    overflow-x: auto;
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
    font-family: var(--font-family, monospace);
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* Specific override for fullscreen modal pre */
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content pre {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
}

.solution-markdown-content pre code,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content pre code {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    padding: 0;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

/* Blockquotes */
.solution-markdown-content blockquote,
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content blockquote {
    border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-purple);
    padding-left: 1rem;
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--text-secondary-color);
    background: rgba(var(--accent-purple-rgb), 0.05);
    border-radius: 0 var(--border-radius-sm) var(--border-radius-sm) 0;
}

/* Fullscreen modal specific blockquote border width */
.fullscreen-modal .solution-pane-content blockquote {
    border-left-width: 4px;
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--text-tertiary-color);
}

/* Emphasis */
.solution-markdown-content strong {
    color: var(--text-color);
    font-weight: 600;
}

.solution-markdown-content em {
    color: var(--accent-purple);
    font-style: italic;
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   9. DIFF VIEW STYLES (FULLSCREEN)
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.diff-card-fullscreen {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: calc(100vh - 280px);
    min-height: 600px;
}

.diff-card-fullscreen .solution-card-body {
    flex-grow: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 0;
}

.diff-controls {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
}

.diff-controls .button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;

    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.12), rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.06));
    border-color: rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.25);
    color: var(--accent-blue);

    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all var(--transition-speed) var(--easing-curve);
}

.diff-controls .button:hover {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.2), rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.12));
    border-color: var(--accent-blue);
    box-shadow: 0 0 12px -3px rgba(var(--accent-blue-rgb), 0.4);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.diff-controls .button:active {
    transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98);
}

.diff-controls .button .icon-slot {
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.diff-output-container-fullscreen {
    height: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    overflow-y: auto;

    background-color: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.7);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-color);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius-md);

    font-family: var(--font-family);
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    line-height: 1.4;

    backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--card-blur-effect);
}

.diff-output-container-fullscreen .empty-state-message {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
    padding: 3rem;

    background: none;
    border-radius: 0;
    color: var(--text-tertiary-color);
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.diff-view-fullscreen {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    font-family: var(--font-family-mono);
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Diff View Scrollbar */
.diff-output-container-fullscreen::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
}

.diff-output-container-fullscreen::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.2);
    border-radius: 12px;
}

.diff-output-container-fullscreen::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--border-hover-color), rgba(var(--border-color-rgb), 0.8));
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid transparent;
    background-clip: content-box;
    transition: background var(--transition-speed-fast);
}

.diff-output-container-fullscreen::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--glow-color), var(--border-hover-color));
}

.diff-output-container-fullscreen::-webkit-scrollbar-corner {
    background: rgba(var(--bg-color-rgb), 0.2);
}

/* --------------------------------------------------------------------------
   10. EVOLUTION FILTER & FIXES
   -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

.modal-body.agent-reasoning-display {
    background: rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb), 0.08);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(var(--accent-pink-rgb), 0.25);
    border-radius: 12px;
}

.agent-strategy-id {
    margin: 1.5rem 0;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-color);
}

.agent-verdict {
    display: block;
    float: right;
    width: fit-content;
    margin: 1.5rem 0 1.5rem auto;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;

    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    letter-spacing: 1.2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border-radius: 12px;
}

.agent-verdict.verdict-eliminate {
    background: var(--accent-pink);
    color: #fff;
}

.agent-verdict.verdict-keep {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--accent-green);
    border: 1px solid var(--accent-green);
}

.agent-analysis {
    clear: both;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

/* Instant Fixes */
.instant-fixes-controls {
    display: flex;
